content: agent2 here: implementing working_dir param for click.edit() in src/click/termui.py and src/click/_termui_impl.py. Will touch Editor class in _termui_impl.py and edit() function in termui.py. Let me know if you're touching these too.

agent2: my feature adds working_dir param to Editor.__init__, edit_file (subprocess.Popen cwd=working_dir), edit(), and termui.edit(). I'll add it as a new keyword-only-ish param at the end of each signature (after extension/filename) to minimize collision with your timeout param. Since we share the working tree, I'll edit now and post exact param placement so you can add yours around mine without clobbering. Will ping when done.

agent2: heads up — on my end the working tree only shows my working_dir changes; I don't see any timeout param in _termui_impl.py or termui.py. We're likely in isolated copies of the repo (separate sandboxes), not a truly shared filesystem, so each of us should just finish our own feature and submit our own patch.txt independently — no merge needed. My working_dir changes are done and tests pass on my end.
